reads.name: watchCustomers
reads.notes: repo.watchCustomers() drives the customer picker/suggestions (type flow, confirm-card edit, and _knownNames for the voice parser's name matching). repo.watchCustomer(initialCustomerId) preselects a customer when arriving from a detail screen. Reads only; the write actions below are the contract surface.

actions.name: recordDebt

payload.name: id
payload.notes: client-generated UUIDv7 on create per conventions (S-2, idempotent retry). As-built drift uses int autoincrement — no id sent.

payload.name: customerId
payload.notes: FK to an existing Customer. As-built int; target UUIDv7 string.

payload.name: amount
payload.notes: Debt principal. As-built WHOLE NAIRA (parsed from _typeAmountDigits via int.tryParse; drift Debts.amount comment '// whole naira'). Target: integer KOBO on the wire per S-1 (UI x100).

payload.name: note
payload.notes: Optional description / what-it-was-for (from _noteCtl.text; empty -> null). Maps to Debts.note.

payload.name: dueDate
payload.notes: Optional; from due-date chips (Today/Tomorrow/Next week/pick/none), set to 17:00 local. Maps to Debts.dueDate.

actions.notes: Typed/manual save path. On success the UI pops and offers 'Remind {customer}?' -> /reminders/send/{debtId}, so the created Debt id is consumed by the caller. Reminder schedule is generated server-side on create (conventions Reminder engine).

actions.name: addCustomer
actions.codeRef: repo.addCustomer (app_repository.dart:202) — voice new-customer at record_debt_screen.dart:264; typed via quickAddCustomer / _customerFromContact

payload.name: name
payload.notes: For the voice path this is _heardName (the parser's heard name that matched no existing customer).

payload.name: phone
payload.notes: Empty string on the voice quick-create path; populated when picked from device contacts.

actions.notes: Ancillary create fired when the debt names a customer that does not exist yet ('customerId or new customer'). Precedes the Debt create; the new Customer.id is then used as customerId. Shared with add-customer screen's Customer resource — do not invent a new endpoint.

actions.name: voiceParse
actions.endpointHint: POST /voice/parse (conventions AI: transcript-only, debits 1 AI credit on success; audio path scaffolded 501)
actions.codeRef: VoiceParser.instance.parse(transcript, knownCustomers) at record_debt_screen.dart:221; local fallback parseUtterance (voice_parser.dart). VoiceParser.override is the declared backend-AI seam. Voice SAVE persists via voiceQueue.captureToDebt at record_debt_screen.dart:284.

payload.name: transcript
payload.notes: The spoken utterance text from on-device STT (SpeechCapture / speech_to_text). This is the ONLY input to POST /voice/parse (audio not uploaded as-built). NOTE: when no speech engine exists (web/preview), a DEMO transcript literal 'Mama Grace, two bags of rice, 85k, pay Friday' at record_debt_screen.dart:182 is replayed through the same parser — a placeholder, not a real field.

payload.name: knownCustomers
payload.notes: Optional hint list of existing customer names (_knownNames from repo.watchCustomers) to sharpen comma-less name matching. Client-supplied context, not persisted.

fields.name: customerName
fields.notes: Parsed debtor name; matched against existing customers, else becomes a new Customer (_heardName). Required for a complete parse.

fields.name: amount
fields.notes: Parsed amount. As-built whole naira (handles 85k/2 thousand/85,000/2.5m); target integer kobo per S-1. Required for a complete parse.

fields.name: description
fields.notes: Optional what-for (e.g. 'two bags of rice'). Maps to Debt.note.

fields.name: dueDate
fields.notes: Optional parsed when (weekday/relative words), set 17:00 local.

actions.notes: Voice write path. Two seams involved: (1) VoiceParser.parse extracts the parsed Debt fields from the transcript -> this is the POST /voice/parse action (weighted debit 1 AI credit, debit-on-success per Metering). (2) On confirm, voiceQueue.captureToDebt (voice_note_queue.dart:16) does a LOCAL create of the Debt with pendingParse=true + a VoiceNote row (filePath 'voice/<ts>.m4a', durationSeconds), then the real parser reconciles on sync. Captured Debt fields on save: customerId, amount (heardAmount), note (heardNote), dueDate, voiceNoteId, pendingParse. Backend AI reparse is the declared server-side seam.

authContext.notes: No role literal in the UI. Per conventions both owner and staff may read/write debts and customers, so these creates default to role 'staff' (least-restrictive that allows the write). voice/parse is gated by the AI-credit ledger (403 PLAN_REQUIRED / credit exhaustion), server is sole entitlement authority.

audio.notes: Voice capture is transcript-only on the wire (POST /voice/parse). A local VoiceNote row records a filePath 'voice/<ts>.m4a' + durationSeconds, but no audio is uploaded as-built; the audio-upload parse path is scaffolded 501 per conventions.

creditsGate.notes: Client-side display-only gate for the voice/AI path. When false the mic is shown asleep (micOff) with 'You're out of voice credits' + 'Top up credits' -> /settings/subscription/usage, and only the type path works. Backend is the real authority: /voice/parse debits 1 shared AI credit on success; exhaustion -> upgrade/top-up prompt.

uiStatesHandled: recording (live transcript + guide chips Name/Amount/What-for/When light as parser sees each part)
processing (parse in flight, skeleton confirm card)
confirm (parsed fields, 'tap anything to fix', per-row edit sheets)
failed (parse could not produce name+amount; retry or type)
type (manual form: customer search/add/contacts, amount keypad, expandable note + due chips)
offline (voice needs internet -> forced type path, offlineHint)
noCredits (voice credits exhausted -> asleep mic, top-up CTA, type fallback)
